BOOKING_MUTUALLY_ACCEPTED.title: Booking accepted
BOOKING_MUTUALLY_ACCEPTED.body: Hi {{name}}, both parties accepted the booking. Complete the payment to start chatting.
BOOKING_MUTUALLY_ACCEPTED.emailBody:
Hi {{name}},

The booking has been accepted by both parties. Complete the payment to unlock the chat and finalize the reservation.

— The HopeTSIT team

Pay now

If the button doesn't work, open the HoPetSit app manually.

new_request_nearby.title: New listing near you
new_request_nearby.body: {{ownerName}} is looking for a pet provider in {{city}}. Open the app to apply.
new_request_nearby.emailBody: A new listing has just been posted in your area. Open the HoPetSit app to apply.

booking_new.title: New booking request
booking_new.body: You received a new booking request.
booking_new.emailBody:
You have a new booking request on HopeTSIT. Open the app to review it.

Review request

If the button doesn't work, open the HoPetSit app manually.

booking_accepted.title: Booking accepted
booking_accepted.body: Your booking request was accepted. Proceed to payment.
booking_accepted.emailBody:
Good news — your booking request was accepted.

Pay now

If the button doesn't work, open the HoPetSit app manually.

booking_rejected.title: Booking rejected
booking_rejected.emailBody: Your booking request was rejected. You can send a new request to another provider.

application_new.title: New application
application_new.body: A provider sent you a request.
application_new.emailBody:
A provider applied to your listing. Open the app to review it.

Review application

If the button doesn't work, open the HoPetSit app manually.

application_accepted.title: Application accepted
application_accepted.emailBody: Your application was accepted. Open the app to see the details.

application_rejected.title: Application rejected
application_rejected.emailBody: Your application was rejected by the owner. Keep applying to other listings.

NEW_MESSAGE.title: New message from {{senderName}}
NEW_MESSAGE.emailBody:
{{senderName}} sent you a new message:

{{preview}}

Open the app to reply.

Open conversation

If the button doesn't work, open the HoPetSit app manually.

NEW_REVIEW.title: You received a new review
NEW_REVIEW.emailSubject: New review on your HopeTSIT profile

PAYMENT_FAILED.title: Payment failed
PAYMENT_FAILED.body: Your payment of {{amount}} {{currency}} could not be processed. Please try again.
PAYMENT_FAILED.emailBody: Your payment of {{amount}} {{currency}} could not be processed. Please open the app and try again.

VISIT_REPORT.title: New visit report
VISIT_REPORT.emailBody: Your sitter submitted a new visit report with {{photoCount}} photos. Mood: {{mood}}. Open the app to view details.

PREMIUM_ACHIEVED.title: Welcome to Premium!
PREMIUM_ACHIEVED.body: You have completed {{count}} bookings. Enjoy exclusive benefits.
PREMIUM_ACHIEVED.emailBody: Congratulations! You are now a Premium member. Enjoy priority access to top pet sitters.

TOP_SITTER_ACHIEVED.title: You are a Top Petsitter! 🏆
TOP_SITTER_ACHIEVED.body: {{count}} completed services · average rating {{avgRating}}/5. Commission reduced to 15%.
TOP_SITTER_ACHIEVED.emailBody: Congratulations! You are now a Top Petsitter. Our platform commission is reduced from 20% to 15% on your future bookings.

REFERRAL_CREDITED.title: Referral reward!
REFERRAL_CREDITED.body: Your referral just completed their first booking. {{amount}} {{currency}} credit added.
REFERRAL_CREDITED.emailBody:
Great news! Your referral just completed their first booking on HopeTSIT.

You have earned {{amount}} {{currency}} in credits, usable on your next reservation.

BOOKING_PAID_CHAT_UNLOCKED.title: Payment received — chat unlocked
BOOKING_PAID_CHAT_UNLOCKED.body: The chat is now open. Agree on the exact location and details with your contact.
BOOKING_PAID_CHAT_UNLOCKED.emailSubject: Payment confirmed — chat is open on HoPetSit
BOOKING_PAID_CHAT_UNLOCKED.emailBody:
Good news! Your booking payment has been confirmed.

The chat is now unlocked: open the HoPetSit app to agree on the exact location and details of the service.

— The HoPetSit team

CHAT_AUTO_WELCOME.title: Chat unlocked
CHAT_AUTO_WELCOME.body: Hello 👋 Let's chat here to agree on the exact location and details of the service.

BOOKING_COMPLETED.title: Booking completed
BOOKING_COMPLETED.body: Your booking has been marked as completed. Leave a review!
BOOKING_COMPLETED.emailBody: Your booking is now marked as completed. Please leave a review to help the community.

booking_paid.title: Payment received!
booking_paid.body: The owner has paid for your booking. You can now chat to agree on the details.
booking_paid.emailBody:
Great news! The payment for the booking has just been confirmed. You can now chat with the owner to agree on the place and time of the service.

View booking

If the button doesn't work, open the HoPetSit app manually.

booking_paid_owner.title: Payment confirmed
booking_paid_owner.body: Your payment has been registered. The booking is active — chat with your provider to agree on the details.
booking_paid_owner.emailBody:
Your payment has just been confirmed. Your booking is now active. Open the HoPetSit app to chat with your provider and agree on the final details.

View booking

If the button doesn't work, open the HoPetSit app manually.

payout_initiated.title: Payout on the way
payout_initiated.body: {{amount}} {{currency}} have been sent to your IBAN. Expected within 1–3 business days.
payout_initiated.emailBody: Your HoPetSit payout of {{amount}} {{currency}} has been initiated. Expected within 1–3 business days.

payout_completed.title: Payout received ✅
payout_completed.body: {{amount}} {{currency}} are now on your bank account.
payout_completed.emailBody: Your HoPetSit payout of {{amount}} {{currency}} has landed on your bank account.

payout_failed.title: Payout failed
payout_failed.body: The transfer could not be completed. Check your IBAN in the app and try again.
payout_failed.emailBody: Your HoPetSit payout to your IBAN has failed. Reason: {{reason}}. Verify your IBAN and contact support if needed.

withdrawal_initiated.title: Withdrawal in progress
withdrawal_initiated.body: Your withdrawal of {{amount}} {{currency}} is on its way to your IBAN.
withdrawal_initiated.emailBody: Your HoPetSit withdrawal of {{amount}} {{currency}} is on its way to your IBAN. 1–3 business days.

withdrawal_completed.title: Withdrawal received ✅
withdrawal_completed.body: {{amount}} {{currency}} are now on your bank account.
withdrawal_completed.emailBody: Your HoPetSit withdrawal of {{amount}} {{currency}} has been credited to your bank account.

withdrawal_failed.title: Withdrawal failed
withdrawal_failed.body: Your withdrawal could not be processed. Your wallet balance has been restored.
withdrawal_failed.emailBody: Your HoPetSit withdrawal failed. Reason: {{reason}}. Your wallet balance was restored, you can retry.
